{{Infobox artifact
| name = Temporal Prism
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Prism]] is a cargo item fresh from the [[Aethril]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Temporal Prism]] has a [[vault]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Stellar Synthesis Labs]] ordered a [[Temporal Prism]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Temporal Prism,” she said, flicking a file to my console. “Fresh from the Aethril.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
